package rulecoverage

func PositiveBufferWriteStringSingleByteLiteral() string {
    ruleID := "buffer_write_string_single_byte_literal"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`bytes.Buffer.WriteString(\"x\")` for single-byte literals instead of `WriteByte`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
